scored_papers.title: CMB Limits on the Absorption of Light Vector and Axial-Vector Dark Matter
scored_papers.abstract: Leptophilic sub-MeV spin-1 dark matter can be converted into a photon via inelastic scattering or absorption in the primordial plasma. Using Planck 2018 T/E/B + lensing data, we obtain upper limits on vector and axial-vector DM-electron couplings for DM masses 100 eV to 100 keV.
scored_papers.reason: 🛰️ Planck 2018 の T/E + lensing 制約を sub-MeV vector/axial DM の吸収・散乱に初適用。CMB B-mode 級の感度を非 GW チャネルでも実証 ✨
scored_papers.summary: 📡 100 eV-100 keV 域で DM-electron 結合上限を提示。水素フォームファクタ抑制が高エネルギー側の感度を決める 🎯

scored_papers.title: The structure of multi-axion solutions to the strong CP problem
scored_papers.abstract: We investigate the general structure of multi-axion solutions to the strong CP problem and study the different qualitative mass-coupling patterns.
scored_papers.reason: 🪐 多軸 axion で m-g_aγγ パターンが QCD バンド外にも展開。LiteBIRD の cosmic birefringence 探索の ALP パラメタ空間に直結 ✨
scored_papers.summary: 🎻 QCD バンドの左右や帯振幅変化が一般的に出現。ALP-photon coupling 探索戦略への含意 💫

scored_papers.title: X-ray spectroscopy mass constraints on V1674 Her: the fastest nova does not have a near-Chandrasekhar white dwarf
scored_papers.abstract: We present a broadband X-ray study of V1674 Her combining XMM-Newton and NuSTAR observations to constrain WD mass and magnetic field via post-shock accretion column model.
scored_papers.reason: 💫 XMM + NuSTAR の post-shock 降着柱モデル fit で nova の WD 質量を決定。XRISM Resolve 系の X線分光路線と地続きで参考に ✨
scored_papers.summary: 🔬 最速 nova V1674 Her の WD 質量は Chandrasekhar 上限近くではないと結論、磁場と質量を同時拘束 🌟
